title: All Gather to Honour Ramon Nasir’s Mother at Burial - FinancialEDGE
description: The media community came out in full force to support Ramon Nasir, Head of Media and External Relations at United Bank for Africa (UBA) Plc, as he laid his mother to rest in his hometown of Ado-Odo, Ogun State. The ceremony was attended by prominent media personalities, including Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director of
html:
The media community came out in full force to support Ramon Nasir, Head of Media and External Relations at United Bank for Africa (UBA) Plc, as he laid his mother to rest in his hometown of Ado-Odo, Ogun State.

The ceremony was attended by prominent media personalities, including Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director of Financial Edge; Steve Nwosu, Publisher/Editor-In-Chief of The Xpress Newspaper; and Chima Titus Nwokwoji, Assistant Business Editor of Nigeria Tribune Newspaper and National Chairman of the Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN).

The presence of these respected media professionals was a testament to the strong relationships built by Ramon Nasir. They joined family and friends to bid a final farewell to his mother, celebrating her life and legacy.
